human_verification.notes: Verified forestry operations boundary clarity, source-backed workflow stages, seasonal and field gating, BMP/environmental escalation, forest-product traceability handling, completion evidence refusal, scenario-to-ability coverage, and validated specification-based positioning.

review_notes: All required shared, execution-processing-and-fulfillment, and agriculture-and-natural-resources abilities are represented.
All required domain research source classes and scenario families are represented.
No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; tenant-specific jurisdiction, permit, certification, program, and ownership questions are documented as required runtime inputs and escalation conditions.

specialist_owned_evidence: Lifecycle state progression is tied to tract, stand, unit, road, environmental, traceability, program, and owner-acceptance evidence.
Boundary handling prevents licensed forestry, environmental, safety, legal, contract, financial, and program-approval overreach.
Seasonal, weather, fire, road, soil, BMP, traceability, grant/program, and completion-evidence failure modes are represented across 12 scenarios.
Runtime remains specification-based; no retained implementation is claimed or implied.
notes: Package is validated as a spec pack and remains specification-based until a separate retained implementation is explicitly promoted.
Tenant-context gaps are not blocking package ambiguity because the lane refuses, holds, or routes when required runtime facts are missing.
